Title: WordPress Website Updates Settings & Take Backup
Notes:
The website design is inspired by luxury spas and hotels, aimed at attracting a high-end client base rather than focusing solely on pets. The look and feel will be professional, calming, and sophisticated, with an emphasis on experience, not “cutesy” elements. The aesthetic should convey a sense of exclusivity and intention, setting us apart from competitors in the pet care space.

2. Aesthetic & Vibe:

  • Tone: Upscale, intentional, experienced, calming, and spa-like.
  • Colors/Tones: Earthy tones throughout the site, creating a warm, welcoming, and professional atmosphere.
  • Font Style: Elegant, minimalistic fonts reflecting a luxury service, with calligraphy-style fonts to elevate the feel of the brand.

3. Key Layout and Navigation Features:

  • Top Bar: Clean, clear drop-down toolbar with small buttons and icons, ensuring easy navigation across the site.
  • Home Page Flow:
    • Immediate Engagement: A dynamic video on the homepage that plays upon user interaction (similar to resort videos), showcasing the location and facilities such as the WL area and parking lot.
    • Calls to Action (CTAs): Prominent CTA buttons at the top of the page, such as "Book Now," where users can directly input information to request services or book appointments online.

Title: WordPress Website Updates Settings & Take Backup
Notes: The website design is inspired by luxury spas and hotels, with the goal of attracting a high-end clientele by focusing on a refined, experience-driven approach rather than traditional pet-centric visuals. The overall look and feel are professional, calming, and sophisticated, emphasizing exclusivity and intentional design to stand out in the pet care industry. The aesthetic follows an upscale, spa-like tone, using earthy color palettes to create a warm, welcoming, and polished atmosphere, complemented by elegant, minimalistic typography with subtle calligraphy-style fonts to enhance the brand’s premium appeal. The layout features a clean and intuitive navigation structure, including a top bar with clear dropdown menus, small buttons, and icons for seamless user experience. The homepage is designed for immediate engagement, incorporating a dynamic, interaction-based video similar to luxury resort presentations, showcasing key areas such as the WL area and parking facilities, while prominent call-to-action buttons like “Book Now” are strategically placed at the top, allowing users to easily input information and schedule services or appointments online.

Title: Google Ads Update
Notes: I actively managed and optimized the Pet Care Plus Google Ads campaigns to enhance lead generation and conversion performance, including refining keywords, improving ad copy with compelling calls-to-action, and applying smart bidding strategies to boost ROI. I have access to call tracking metrics, but I was hoping for a more dedicated dashboard similar to the reports previously provided, as having real-time updates in one place is much more efficient. I also spoke with our outside consulting service, and they are concerned about not seeing much traffic pushed through call tracking metrics. They’re curious if all ads are set to drive calls, or if there are ads not doing so. It's important that all calls are routed through the CTM phone number, (312) 500-6252, to ensure accurate tracking.

Title: Implement Google Analytics, Google Search Console & Google Tag Manager
Notes: To meet the client's requirements, we will create a comprehensive SEO dashboard for PCP using Looker Studio that integrates with CTM (Call Tracking Metrics), Google Ads, Google Analytics 4 (GA4), and SEMrush. This dashboard will provide real-time updates and insights into call tracking data, campaign performance, and website analytics. It will feature metrics from CTM, including call volume, duration, and performance, ensuring all calls are routed through the designated CTM phone number (312-500-6252). Google Ads data will include key performance indicators like clicks, impressions, CPC, conversion rates, and specific CTA performance, while also tracking campaigns that may not be generating the expected call traffic. GA4 will contribute website metrics such as sessions, bounce rate, and user behavior, focusing on conversions and CTA effectiveness. SEMrush will provide SEO insights, covering organic traffic, keyword rankings, backlinks, site health, and competitor comparisons. The dashboard will be designed with real-time updates, customizable filters, and clear visual indicators, ensuring the client can easily monitor performance, identify issues, and optimize campaigns. This consolidated data will give the client the necessary tools to track call generation, website engagement, and SEO performance all in one place.

Title: WordPress Website Updates Settings & Take Backup

Title: Implement Google Analytics, Google Search Console & Google Tag Manager
Notes: To streamline and optimize Pet Care Plus' Google Ads campaigns, call tracking metrics, and analytics, I propose creating a comprehensive report dashboard that integrates Call Tracking Metrics (CTM), Google Ads, and Google Analytics. This dashboard will provide real-time updates on key metrics such as call volume, duration, and performance from CTM, ensuring all calls are routed through the CTM phone number (312) 500-6252 for accurate tracking. It will also track Google Ads performance, including clicks, impressions, CPC, conversion rates, and the effectiveness of ad extensions, audience targeting, and smart bidding strategies. Additionally, the dashboard will monitor landing page performance, ensuring they align with ad messaging and optimize load speeds for higher conversion rates. Google Analytics will contribute insights on website traffic, user behavior, and conversion tracking, allowing for real-time monitoring of session data, bounce rates, and A/B test results. The dashboard will feature customizable filters, performance alerts, and the ability to identify underperforming ads or issues with call routing, providing a centralized view for continuous optimization. This integrated approach will ensure data transparency, allowing for quicker identification of issues, boosting lead generation and conversions while maintaining effective call tracking.
